prompt: The incremental frame decoder trusts resource declarations for too long. Enforce Limits::max_frame_bytes and the cumulative per-message work budget as soon as a complete 12-byte header is available and before any payload buffer is allocated or observed. Work accounting must not wrap at uint64_t boundaries, including when the configured limit is UINT64_MAX. Keep fragmented headers and payloads working, preserve zero-copy delivery for complete contiguous frames, and report the documented Error value and exact diagnostic text. A zero-size, zero-work header terminates a message and resets its cumulative work. Do not change the wire format or public API. The public header, Makefile, ignore file, and all test sources and helpers are protected and must remain unchanged. Acceptance is `make test`.
